description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisite: Kamizuru Clan, Level 12+
You learn to introduce human ingenuity with nature's evolution to produce higher quality medicinal materials. You gain the following benefits;

  • You gain proficiency in Medicine Kit or Poison Kits.
  • When creating a consumable using your Apitherapy clan feature, increase the consumable's die size by 1 step.
  • Over the course of a rest, when you would create a Kamizuru Honey you can also expend one use of a Medicine Kit to enhance the consumable into a Royal Jelly. As a bonus action, a creature can consume a Royal Jelly gaining 4d10 + Wis Mod + Prof Bonus Temporary Hit & Chakra Points for 1 hour. You cannot gain the benefit of this consumable more than once in a single 24-hour Period.
  • Over the course of a rest, when you would create a Kamizuru Toxin you can also expend one use of a Poison Kit to enhance the poison into a Kamizuru Venom. As a bonus action, a creature can apply a Kamizuru Venom to a weapon as a bonus action, and is only expended when striking a creature. Once expended in this way, the poison is no longer able to be applied by the weapon without being reapplied. This poison has 2 uses before being removed from your inventory. A creature subjected to this poison must succeed a Constitution saving throw vs your Jutsu Save DC taking 6d8 poison damage, gaining two ranks of envenomed on a failed save, or half damage and no further effect on a successful save.
